sentences.text: The bullet formula and the truth rule
Product bullets are where feature-to-benefit translation earns money:
The formula: feature → so what → benefit.
"700-fill down (feature) traps more warm air (so what) so you stay warm at -10° without the bulk (benefit)"
Front-load the outcome: buyers scan the first 3 words of each bullet — lead with "Stays warm at -10°" not "Constructed with"
